# Javi Alvarado

First mentioned: **3308-05-13**  
Last mentioned: **3308-06-17**  
Total mentions: **4**

## Related


## Biography

Commander Javi Alvarado made his living running trade routes to Forester's Choice, the outpost where the descendants of the generation ship Golconda had resettled after abandoning their ancient vessel in 3305. In May 3308, his routine runs placed him at the centre of an extraordinary first-contact situation when the Artificers Clan, a nomadic tribe aboard a Dredger-class bulk cruiser, entered the Upaniklis system and began examining the Golconda.

The Golcondans, cautious with outsiders, asked Alvarado to approach the dredger on their behalf. His hails drew only one response — a burst of rapid, densely verbose language — but he gathered enough to understand that the Artificers were interested in the generation ship itself. His account, given to Vox Galactica, provided one of the first glimpses into a reclusive culture that would reshape the Golcondans' future.
